page.title: Passengers
page.accessDenied: You do not have permission to view passengers.

delete.title: Delete Passenger
delete.description: This will soft-delete the passenger. You can reactivate them later.

reactivate.title: Reactivate Passenger
reactivate.description: This will restore the passenger's access to the system.

toast.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

empty.title: No passengers found
empty.message: No passengers match the current filters.
